# Claude Platform Training

Claude API & Developer Training for learning how to manage & build AI applications using the Claude Platform API. Master authentication, model selection, and practical integration patterns to deliver real AI-powered features for freelance clients.

💵 $200
⏱ 20 Hours
📅 5 Days
🎯 Guru · Freelancer · Upwork

Prefer to skip the training and have it done for you? [**Hire us for Claude Platform Support**](/linux-ai-services/claude-ai-platform-services/) instead.

## What Is Claude Platform Training?

Claude Platform Training is School of Freelancing's hands-on program for learning how to manage and build AI applications using the Claude Platform API — Anthropic's API for accessing Claude AI models. The course covers API fundamentals, authentication, rate limits, prompt design, and integration patterns, then teaches how to package those skills into a professional freelance portfolio and land AI development clients on Upwork, Guru, and Freelancer.

## Key Takeaways

- **Format:** Online, instructor-led, hands-on
- **Duration:** 10 hours over 5 days
- **Price:** $200 USD, paid in full before enrollment
- **Covers:** Claude API fundamentals, authentication & rate limits, prompt design & integration patterns, freelance portfolio building
- **Best for:** Beginners and developers seeking freelance AI development work on Upwork, Guru, and Freelancer

## Participation Requirements

- **[DigitalOcean:](https://try.digitalocean.com/freetrialoffer/)** Ubuntu Linux Server (24.04 or 26.04 LTS recommended).
- **Domain:** Any domain or sub domain will work.
- **Freelance Marketplace:** Verified Upwork · Guru · Freelancer Account.
- **Land Direct Clients:** From Linkedin and YouTube Account.
- **Rigorous:** Need to have patience and concentration during all training sessions.

## Connectivity

- **Portable messaging devices for 24/7 client communication.**
- **Reliable fiber-optic internet access for uninterruptible training sessions.**

## What You'll Learn

- Claude Platform API fundamentals, authentication, and rate limits
- Managing and building real AI-powered applications and developer workflows
- Prompt design and API integration patterns for production use
- Building a professional freelance portfolio around Claude API projects
- Client acquisition and communication for AI development contracts

## Who This Is For

This training suits beginners and developers who can commit to 20 hours of hands-on, instructor-led training over five days, and who meet the
[system & participation requirements](/contact-us/) (Ubuntu Desktop 24.04/26.04 LTS PC, reliable fiber-optic internet, and a valid government-issued ID).
